title: Python/Rust: LR-FHSS simulation model
description:
Model LR-FHSS collision behavior in simulator.

## Changes
1. Add LR-FHSS mode to simulated radio
2. Model fragment-level collisions (not packet-level)
3. Simulate hopping sequence and partial packet recovery
4. Compare collision rates: standard LoRa vs LR-FHSS

## Collision model
- Standard LoRa: any overlap = both packets lost
- LR-FHSS: overlap corrupts fragments, FEC may recover

## Metrics to capture
- Packet delivery rate at various densities
- Effective throughput with 2x airtime penalty
- Crossover point where LR-FHSS wins
